name: wallstreet-tieling
description: Wall Street Tieling / 华尔街驻铁岭办事处: open-source enterprise intelligence and risk discovery plugin.

interface.shortDescription: 输入企业名，聚合公开情报、主体图谱、证据链和 Word 尽调报告。
interface.longDescription: Wall Street Tieling is an open-source enterprise intelligence and risk discovery system. It aggregates auditable public sources, standardizes evidence, builds subject graphs, and generates due diligence reports with source traceability.
defaultPrompt: 给这家公司做一份企业情报与风险发现尽调报告
聚合公开信息，生成主体画像、证据链和 Word 报告
使用深度模式做更全面的主体关系检索
